name: Authentication Scheme Change
description: Backend changed authentication from Bearer token to API key without updating OpenAPI spec

backend.implementation: const apiKey = req.headers['x-api-key']; if (!apiKey || !validateApiKey(apiKey)) { return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid API key' }); }

fields.userImpact: All authenticated requests fail with 401 Unauthorized. Users cannot access protected resources. Complete feature breakdown for logged-in users.
